description: TV steam-game-lane module. Rust owns Steam and Gamescope exist as optional game lane, not the main Arch TV session; this sidecar carries constants only.

managed_files.content:
[Desktop Entry]
Name=Steam Game Lane (Gamescope)
Comment=Optional Arch TV Steam/Gamescope lane; not the main session
Exec=/usr/local/bin/arch-tv-steam-game-lane
Type=Application
Categories=Game;

# Arch TV Steam Game Lane

Steam owns Proton and compatibility runtime downloads. Gamescope is an optional game/app lane and is not the SDDM autologin session.
